html:
Exclusive to:

“A portable campfire that stays lit even when packed!”

-

The Portable Campfire is a character-specific item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Walter after unlocking the Campfire Enthusiast skill. When placed, it provides lights and heat, and allows players to cook with it. Similar to a Fire Pit, it can be relit by adding Fuel with twice the efficiency of a Campfire. Its max fuel time is 4.5 minutes.

When dismantled, it retains its fuel and continues burning when placed again.

Tips

  • Like Fire Pits, haunting the Portable Campfire has a 10% chance to add 45 seconds fuel, only when it is burning.

“Finally, fire on the go! Patent pending.”
–Wilson, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Or carry a lighter?”
–Willow, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Never afraid of dark forest again. Not that Wolfgang ever afraid.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“I may carry warmth with me, yet I am ever cold.”
–Wendy, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“PORTABLE INCINERATION UNIT”
–WX-78, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“A travelling heat source. Useful if handled with due caution.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Sure, Lucy. We can feed it.”
–Woodie, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Fire on demand? I may have underestimated the young tree trooper.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Prömetheus himself wöuld burn with envy!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“We can stay warm and cozy on our adventures!”
–Webber, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Most convenient!”
–Warly, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Warm everywhere always”
–Wormwood, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Now that's handy.”
–Winona, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Mobile combustible!”
–Wortox, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Florp! Can take cozy time anywhere!”
–Wurt, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“Woby, we're geniuses!”
–Walter, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“That Walter is a clever little fellow.”
–Wanda, when examining a Portable Campfire item
“A portable campfire that stays lit even when packed!”
-
The Portable Campfire is a character-specific item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Walter after unlocking the Campfire Enthusiast skill. When placed, it provides lights and heat, and allows players to cook with it. Similar to a Fire Pit, it can be relit by adding Fuel with twice the efficiency of a Campfire. Its max fuel time is 4.5 minutes.
When dismantled, it retains its fuel and continues burning when placed again.

Like Fire Pits, haunting the Portable Campfire has a 10% chance to add 45 seconds fuel, only when it is burning.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lửa Trại Di Động là một vật phẩm dành riêng cho từng nhân vật chỉ có trong Don't Starve Together. Nó chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Walter sau khi mở khóa kỹ năng Người say mê lửa trại. Khi được đặt, nó sẽ cung cấp ánh sáng và nhiệt, đồng thời cho phép người chơi nấu ăn với nó. Tương tự như Lò lửa, nó có thể được đốt lại bằng cách thêm Nhiên liệu với hiệu suất gấp đôi so với Lửa trại. Thời gian nạp nhiên liệu tối đa của nó là 4,5 phút.
